vBRIEFInfo.description: Gate speckit Phase 3 -> Phase 4 transition on SPECIFICATION.md existence and hash match. Also restructure Post-Phase 3 section as a numbered transition gate.

plan.title: speckit Phase 3 -> Phase 4 advances without enforcing ! task spec:render

narratives.Problem: speckit.md Phase 3 declares ! Run task spec:render but nothing in the workflow contract enforces it. Yolo-mode agents advance to Phase 4 with specification.vbrief.json + plan.vbrief.json written and no SPECIFICATION.md anywhere. Defeats Phase 3 review intent.
narratives.Action: Add a !-level Phase 3 Transition Criterion to deft/strategies/speckit.md requiring SPECIFICATION.md to exist and its hash to match the current specification.vbrief.json narratives. Restructure Post-Phase 3: Render for Review from prose into a numbered transition gate mirroring Phase 2 approval gate. Optionally have deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md call task spec:render itself at the boundary.
narratives.Test: Add a content test in tests/content/ asserting speckit.md Phase 3 contains the transition criterion. If the setup skill enforces the render, add a fixture test for a greenfield yolo walkthrough that refuses to enter Phase 4 without SPECIFICATION.md.
narratives.Outcome: Greenfield speckit + yolo produces SPECIFICATION.md before Phase 4 entry, 100 percent reproducible. Phase 3 stated review intent is actually enforced.

items.title: Add Phase 3 Transition Criterion (SPECIFICATION.md exists + hash matches) to speckit.md
Restructure Post-Phase 3 Render for Review as a numbered transition gate
(Optional) Have deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md invoke task spec:render at Phase 3->4 boundary
Add content test asserting transition criterion presence in speckit.md
Add regression test for greenfield+yolo refuses Phase 4 without SPECIFICATION.md
